note: The DreamLayer plugin registry. Community-contributed plugins, validated by CI before they land. The website, phone app, and Mac panel all read this file. Social numbers (downloads/rating/comments) are placeholders until the hosted layer lands; the schema already carries them.

plugins.name: face-synth
plugins.author: dreamlayer
plugins.description: Your head is a MIDI controller — yaw picks the note, pitch bends the filter, a tap plays it. Multiple wearers become a distributed band over the mesh.
